summary: A single-story, hollow rectangular stone structure with an interior courtyard/open center (U-shaped roofline visible). Thick stone walls are patterned with alternating bands of smooth stonebrick and cobblestone; the roof is stepped with light-colored slabs and a dark stripe near the top. A small central doorway on one wall with a glowstone light above/inside; short cobblestone block perimeter markers surround the exterior.

shape.overall_form: rectangular outer shell with large open internal courtyard (U-shaped plan seen from top)
shape.symmetry: approximately bilateral symmetry along the front-center axis

materials.name: stonebrick
materials.role: primary wall blocks and roof slab field

materials.name: cobblestone
materials.role: decorative bands, buttresses and perimeter low blocks

materials.name: brick
materials.role: dark stripe in roof (could be nether_brick or dark brick)

rebuild_hints: Outer walls are solid to about 6-8 blocks high with horizontal decorative bands: two or three rows of cobblestone banding separated by smooth stonebrick rows.
Create a U-shaped footprint (open courtyard at rear/center) approximately 18x14 blocks exterior; leave a central gap/opening on the inward-facing side to form the courtyard.
Place evenly spaced short cobblestone block markers outside the wall base (about one-block high, separated by one block gaps) matching photos.
Use light-colored stone slabs for a stepped layered roof (three stepped layers visible) with a single dark stripe block row (dark brick or nether_brick) between slab layers near top crest.
Add vertical cobblestone buttress columns at regular intervals on exterior walls (they protrude by 1 block and span full wall height).
Add a simple single-block-wide entrance in the front wall with glowstone positioned above or just inside the doorway.
uncertainties: Exact block IDs for the dark roof stripe: appears dark (nether_brick or red nether variant) but not certain.
Precise exterior footprint dimensions: estimated from images; width/depth may be off by a few blocks.
Interior floor detail and any internal walls not visible from supplied views are unknown (assumed empty courtyard).
Number of decorative band rows on all sides assumed consistent; hidden sides may differ slightly.
